source_issue.title: can't edit on mobile as hard to close and reopen settings

summary_markdown:
```markdown
## What this issue is about
This issue addresses the difficulty of editing settings on mobile devices in the Plone Volto interface. The current mobile setup makes it hard to open and close the settings sidebar, which can impede basic editing tasks.

## What needs to be done
We aim to improve the mobile user experience by implementing a more intuitive toggle button for the settings sidebar in the toolbar. Suggestions include positioning a cog icon at the bottom of the toolbar and ensuring easy access to close settings. We also need to consider how to position undo, cut, and paste options in relation to the settings button.

## Helpful background
The discussion mentions that while improving mobile editing isn't a priority for the upcoming 6.0 release, small changes can significantly enhance usability. Several alternatives for implementing the toggle button and organizing toolbar functions have been suggested but remain unresolved.

## Good first steps
1. Familiarize yourself with the current settings sidebar functionality on mobile.
2. Review the proposed changes to the toolbar layout, considering both usability and consistency.
3. Explore the full [Quanta design](https://www.figma.com/file/YpaRSKjFcFaAkVYnTSVGuz/Volto-UI-%E2%80%93-Quanta?node-id=1786%3A286) for context on design decisions.
4. Start drafting modifications for the toggle button based on the ideas shared in the issue discussion.
```
